name: Tomato-Zucchini Scallop
recipeIngredient: 4 oz sharp cheddar cheese, shredded (1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish, layer half of the zucchini, onion, sliced tomatoes, and croutons.
3. Season with 1/2 teaspoon salt and a dash of pepper.
4. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
5. Top with tomato wedges.
6. Cover and bake in the moderate oven for 1 hour.
7. Uncover and sprinkle with cheese.
8. Return to the oven until the cheese melts.
Makes 6 servings.
